name: Three Sisters
short_description: Three Sisters is a goofy RPG featuring some cute little (not nightmare inducing) enemies and a story where nothing bad ever happens! Wait, what's that? You played the other games? crap.
detailed_description:
Before You Buy Disclaimer:

Three Sisters IS NOT a horror game nor is it trying to be a horror game. Do not play with the expectations of being scared. This is a semi-narrative based game that tells of the adventures of the characters from previous games before said games happened.

DISCLAIMER: 

The "First Demo Trailer" is an old trailer made over half a year before the game was put on Steam and does not reflect the current state of the game. It still had unfinished assets, placeholder artwork and the old combat system. This disclaimer will be removed whenever a new trailer is made 

Ever wonder what happened to Vibia and her sisters? No? Well you're probably in the majority, not many people even heard of them...

Oh well, here's what we got to offer I guess.

Featuring Music from Multiple Artist

  • Uber

  • Garret J.

  • Juampy

  • Sibermanov

  • TurtleBox

  • Fr4nzit

  • Mr. Crow

Over 100 Songs

I made way too much music

100% Pure Shitpost

This game is based off a series of shitpost games from Bobox (Will not say the website's actual name out of fear of legal action) that were, and still are, heavily inspired by SiIvaGunner and Gachimuchi!

Tons of Items

Because who doesn't like having options?

Absolutely Mentally Ill Enemies

no seriously, you will get pissed on by crack heads and crabs

Way Too much Gameplay

There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. There's way too much. please help me

Thrilling RPG Maker Gameplay

Yeahhhhh it's totally just default rpg maker with nothing else, no secrets or anything. Just pure slop yeahhhhh!

The sloppiest game to ever hit Steam!

You like slop yeahhh? We do too.

Basic Controls

[ARROW KEYS] to walk, [Z] or [SPACE] to interact, [ESC] to open menu and go back
All controls are configurable within the Options menu

Sleep tight Aniki... Billy Herrington 1969 - 2018
